Suzhou Delphi Laser Co., Ltd. is a highly authentic, tier-1 industrial manufacturer and publicly listed company (Foreign-Invested Joint Stock) operating at the cutting edge of laser technology. Its operational metrics—a substantial registered capital of over 103 million RMB and a robust workforce of 681 insured employees (2024 data)—perfectly substantiate its complex high-tech manufacturing claims. Located in the Suzhou Industrial Park, the company is a genuine R&D and production powerhouse specializing in advanced laser sources (semiconductor, fiber, solid-state lasers) and precision optoelectronic equipment. Its corporate governance is highly mature, evidenced by the presence of an Investor Relations email (ir@delphilaser.com) typical of publicly traded firms, and a foreign legal representative (ZHAO YUXING). This is a verified, high-value entity in the advanced manufacturing supply chain.
